body.title: Move the palace (tickets, decisions, all dev-process records) to a filesystem JSON store in the repo
body.why: The palace fragmented across four stores with no sync; /sorted wrote files, never the DB, so the DB went stale. Akien: 'this palace system is not working ... we will be moving the palace to the filesystem and out of the database.' Plus the self-aware note: an API-write-through palace assumes a disciplined service; CC operates on files + grep + git. Match the substrate to the operator.
body.genesis_note: First record in the store IS the decision to build the store. Dogfood. Emitted via lab/claudecode/memory_emit.py, the single chokepoint.
locked_this_pass: projection not relocation (additive, sources stay authoritative)
semantic ids in links, never filenames
